CHART 58.
. Saturn is in Sagittarius with no

Ven. planet placed in the adjoining houses.
Sun

Mer.

Mars Venus, his friend, is in Aries which is

he will spend away what he earns. He

sociation with bad elements will bring
Sat. Dt

Rahu he will have daughters instead of
sons. He will engage himself in various activities and have losses all through.
